Huang Ang ťĽĄśėā
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Ang (ťĽĄśėā)was born in Jiuquan. From a powerful clan in Jiuquan. Killed Xu Yi, executed soon after.
